description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized encorafenib in combination with binimetinib for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable or metastatic melanoma with a BRAF V600 variant. The efficacy and safety of encorafenib have been established only in patients with melanoma tumours expressing BRAF V600E and V600K variants or colorectal tumours expressing BRAF V600E.
